paper_title: Determination of Growth Rate and Age Structure of Boswellia papyrifera from Tree Ring Analysis: Implications for Sustainable Harvest Scheduling

methods.description: Process for collecting tree ring samples from Boswellia papyrifera to analyze growth rates and age structure.

steps.description: Select representative Boswellia papyrifera trees for sampling.
Extract core samples from the selected trees using an increment borer.
steps.searchable_summary: extract core samples using increment borer

methods.description: Analysis of tree ring samples to determine growth rates and age structure of Boswellia papyrifera.

steps.description: Prepare core samples by mounting and sanding them to reveal tree rings clearly.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare and sand core samples to reveal tree rings

steps.description: Count and measure the width of tree rings under a microscope.
steps.searchable_summary: count and measure tree ring widths

steps.description: Calculate growth rates and estimate the age of each tree based on ring data.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate growth rates and estimate tree age
